title: Shulker Enchantments
description: Neat enchantments for your shulker boxes
body:
This mod currently adds the "Siphon" and "Refill" enchantments.
They can be added to your Shulker Box to turn it into a very convenient tool.

Using the **Siphon** enchantment, **Any item that you pick up will be immediately stored in your Shulker Box** as long as that Shulker Box already has at least one item of the same type.

The Shulker Box must be in your inventory to work.

With the **Refill** enchantment, using an item or placing a block will use up the inventory of your shulker box instead of your main inventory. Basically, this refills your held stack of items or blocks.

You can find these enchantments by trading with villagers or through fishing.
 

This mod also works with other type of items that behave like Shulker boxes (such as strongboxes, backpacks, satchels, etc).

If you want to add support for these enchantments in your mod, [check out the developer documentation](https://github.com/Ephys/mc-shulker-enchantments#for-developers)

Supported Mods:
- Curious Shulker Boxes
- Enchantment descriptions

Due to how the enchantment glint is implemented, closed Shulker Boxes are now simple Block Models instead of a complex Tile Entity Renderer. 

Having a lot of shulker boxes should therefore be less laggy. There might be compatibility issues regarding this change. Please open an issue on the GitHub page if you experience one.

Mod showcase from Boodlyneck : https://youtu.be/4vLu5JXMJ1g?t=304
